body:
## Rationale

The `/spotlights` page is a **live, active page** (SpotlightsArchivePage component, confirmed in `packages/frontend/App.js` with dedicated `isSpotlightsPage()` router) that has:
- ❌ NO sitemap entry (grep confirms 0 matches for 'spotlights' in `api/sitemap.js`)
- ❌ NO SSR meta handler (0 matches in `api/meta/[...path].js`)
- ❌ NO JSON-LD schema

This page surfaces drummer spotlight/feature articles — high-engagement editorial content. It is completely invisible to Google and AI crawlers.

## Impact

- Drummer spotlight archives are curated editorial content; deserves CollectionPage markup
- Indexing the spotlights hub drives discovery of featured drummer profiles
- Same fix class as /battles hub (#1477, promoted + shipped), /guides hub (#1349, shipped)

## Files to touch

| File | Change |
|---|---|
| `api/sitemap.js` | Add `{ loc: '/spotlights', priority: '0.85', changefreq: 'weekly' }` |
| `api/meta/[...path].js` | Add handler for `path === '/spotlights'` with title, description, url, and CollectionPage + FAQPage JSON-LD |

## SSR meta template

```js
if (path === '/spotlights') {
  return {
    title: `Metal Drummer Spotlights — Featured Profiles & Stories | ${SITE_NAME}`,
    description: 'Deep-dive spotlight features on metal drumming legends. Equipment breakdowns, career milestones, and gear stories for 60+ pro drummers.',
    image: DEFAULT_IMAGE,
    type: 'website',
    url: `${BASE_URL}/spotlights`,
    articleSchema: JSON.stringify({
      '@context': 'https://schema.org',
      '@type': 'CollectionPage',
      name: 'Metal Drummer Spotlights',
      description: 'Curated spotlight features on professional metal drummers.',
      url: `${BASE_URL}/spotlights`,
      publisher: { '@type': 'Organization', name: 'MetalForge', url: BASE_URL },
    }),
  };
}
```

## Verify

1. `grep 'spotlights' api/sitemap.js` → returns sitemap entry
2. `curl -s 'https://metalforge.io/api/meta?path=/spotlights' | jq .title` → returns correct title
3. JSON-LD CollectionPage validates on schema.org Rich Results Test
4. Google Search Console URL inspection confirms page is indexable

## Done

`/spotlights` has sitemap entry, SSR meta title/description, and CollectionPage JSON-LD schema.
title: SEO: /spotlights page — add sitemap entry + SSR meta + CollectionPage schema (live page, zero SEO coverage)
